prompt: Edit image 1 by adding classic top and bottom meme text overlays using a bold white font with a black border, referencing the style in Image 2 and Image 5. The text content should be humorous or reactive, in the style of internet memes like those in Image 3 and Image 4.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 by adding two meme text overlays: one positioned horizontally centered at the very top of the image, and the other horizontally centered at the very bottom. The text for both overlays should use a bold, sans-serif font (such as Impact), be white in color, and have a thick black border, consistent with the classic meme text style exemplified in image 2 and image 5. The content of the text should be humorous, reactive, or a relatable commentary, aligning with the typical internet meme humor demonstrated in image 3 and image 4.
objects: Image of a man with a confused expression
Top text overlay: humorous text, white with thick black border, bold sans-serif font, horizontally centered at the very top
Bottom text overlay: humorous text, white with thick black border, bold sans-serif font, horizontally centered at the very bottom
